title: COMMUNITY CLASSES - 211info
text: FAMILY PROMISE OF LINCOLN COUNTY COMMUNITY CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers life skills, parenting, financial literacy, nutrition, and second chance renters' classes. Classes are primarily for families utilizing shelter services, but may be opened to the general public. 5030 SE Highway 101 Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Classes: Varies Email (541) 614-0964 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 614-0964 Main phone Main phone (541) 614-0964 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Lincoln County Transit stop 1/2 block north Services: Financial Literacy Training Life Skills Education Nutrition Education Parenting Skills Classes Tenant Readiness Education Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FAMILY SHELTER MATERIAL GOODS - COMMUNITY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAMILY PROMISE OF LINCOLN COUNTY
